silhouette: Broad squat shield-shaped mascot silhouette, like a sturdy protective shield, with a centered shallow top crest, firm upper shoulders, near-vertical sides, broad rounded lower body, and grounded base. Match the uploaded model-sheet reference image.
face: Large dot eyes, compact smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper left side.
body_language: Planted, commanding, and ready to bark field instructions.
do_not_change: Keep the broad shield shape from the uploaded reference image.
Do not turn him into a generic five-sided polygon, teardrop, circle, pear, or rounded blob.
Never borrow Muci's compact viewer-left-leaning teardrop silhouette, long droplet curve, beginner-friendly softness, or protagonist expression.
Never describe or draw Coach Ray with generic polygon language; use broad shield-shaped protective mascot instead.
Keep the pose grounded and authoritative.
Do not turn him into a floppy or timid silhouette.
